framework.name: Skyfire KYAPay — Signed JWTs for Agent Identity
framework.description: Skyfire's KYAPay protocol uses signed JWTs for verified agent identity. $9.5M raised from Neuberger Berman, a16z CSX, Coinbase Ventures. Claims 'thousands of transactions daily' via Agent Checkout. Joint demo with Visa showed autonomous purchasing. Founder previously sold Jibe (RCS) to Google.
framework.raw_quote: KYAPay protocol ('Know Your Agent') uses signed JWTs for verified agent identity. Skyfire's Agent Checkout product processes thousands of transactions daily.

source.title: The Agentic Commerce Landscape: Who's Building What in 2026
